title: stillingia sylvatica subsp. tenuis
intro: Stillingia sylvatica subsp. tenuis, also known as the Queen's Root or Yellow Root, is a subspecies of the Stillingia sylvatica plant, a perennial herb native to North America. The plant contains compounds such as stilbenes and lignans, which exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The medicinal properties of Stillingia sylvatica subsp. tenuis are said to provide relief from digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, as well as exhibit antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its health benefits and medicinal properties.
